hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build scalable web and mobile applications using Java, Spring Boot, ASP.NET, Android and modern web technologies.

about.title: About
about.description1: I am Nabil Karara, a Software Engineer and Full Stack Developer studying MIAGE (Computer Methods Applied to Business Management). I bridge the gap between technical execution and business needs, building secure, high-performance systems.
about.description2: Focused on engineering clean, maintainable, and scalable software solutions. I specialize in backend architectures, database design, and intuitive mobile/web client development.
about.educationDesc: MIAGE Master's - Specialization in application development and project management
about.expertiseDesc: Full-Stack Development with Java, Spring Boot, ASP.NET, and modern frontend tools
about.objectiveDesc: PFE Internship 2025 - Web/Mobile Development in an innovative company

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A collection of engineering projects detailing technical challenges, core solutions, and features.

springRH.title: SpringRH
springRH.description: Bilingual enterprise human resource portal designed to digitalize recruiting and onboarding pipelines.
springRH.challenge: HR and recruitment processes were heavily paper-based, leading to high processing latency and onboarding friction for candidates.
springRH.solution: Developed a high-performance HR platform with modular dashboards, digital records management, and automated leave request workflows.
features: End-to-end recruitment pipeline tracker
Fully bilingual interface (English/French)
Modular employee directory with search and filters
Direct manager email notification systems

employeeManagement.title: Employee Management System
employeeManagement.description: Enterprise-level multi-platform administrative console for corporate directory and role-based access control.
employeeManagement.challenge: Fragmented employee records made tracking attendance and managing custom permissions difficult for administrators.
employeeManagement.solution: Built a centralized system featuring role-based dashboards, secure JWT login, and robust CRUD endpoints for employee lifecycle management.
features: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) security model
Automated attendance logs and leave tracking
One-click Excel payroll reports generator
System audit trails tracking administrative changes

socialNetwork.title: Social Network App (Connectify)
socialNetwork.description: Real-time visual feed and collaboration space featuring interactive messaging and responsive UI.
socialNetwork.challenge: Designing a real-time reactive feed and instant messaging interface that scales gracefully under concurrent user traffic.
socialNetwork.solution: Crafted a React single page application backed by a Node.js API with custom WebSocket channels to deliver instant feedback.
features: Instant messaging with real-time delivery status
Dynamic feed engine with post sharing
Like and comment reactions with real-time counts
Fully responsive layout built for mobile & desktop

androidFirebase.title: Android Firebase Employee Manager
androidFirebase.description: Native Android directory application backed by Firebase for live operations and offline caching.
androidFirebase.challenge: Field managers working in areas with poor mobile networks needed continuous app availability and offline data synchronization.
androidFirebase.solution: Engineered a native Android application integrated with Firebase Realtime Database, implementing offline disk persistence and local cache sync.
features: Real-time bidirectional database synchronization
Local database cache supporting full offline functionality
Direct contact calling and email shortcuts from profiles
Modern Material Design 3 user interface

appRO.title: Application RO (Graph Algorithms)
appRO.description: Operations Research modeling dashboard simulating graph theory pathfinding and optimization.
appRO.challenge: Logistics and routing optimization models are difficult to visualize and debug without interactive graphs.
appRO.solution: Created a Java desktop utility with interactive graphical node editors running Dijkstra, Kruskal, and Prim algorithms to compute path minimizations.
features: Interactive canvas to draw, drag, and connect graph nodes
Visual Dijkstra shortest path pathfinding solver
Kruskal & Prim minimum spanning tree visualizers
Step-by-step algorithm execution debugger

skills.title: Skills
skills.problemSolvingDesc: Designing algorithms and data structures to optimize processing efficiency.
skills.continuousLearningDesc: Staying updated with modern frameworks and industry-standard practices.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: My professional journey, combining engineering internships with business methods.

points: Designed and implemented clean, responsive interfaces for administrative dashboards.
Refactored legacy REST APIs and optimized SQL database queries, improving performance by 25%.
Collaborated with project managers in an Agile (Scrum) workflow to deliver production-ready features.
Architected enterprise projects using Spring Boot, C#, and React.
Created custom solvers for operations research models, graphing pathfinding algorithms in Java.
Engineered secure relational databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL) with advanced audit triggers.
Mastered advanced concepts in software architecture, design patterns, and system design.
Developed full-stack web and mobile apps following test-driven development (TDD).
Managed team repositories with strict Git branching strategies and continuous integration (CI).

education.title: Education
education.description: Academic studies bridging computer science, software engineering, and business management.

master.title: Master's Degree in MIAGE
master.description: Computer Methods Applied to Business Management. Focus on software architecture, enterprise database administration, agile project management, and business intelligence.

licence.title: Bachelor's Degree in MIAGE / Computer Science
licence.description: Foundational computer science studies covering object-oriented programming (Java/C++), web development, databases (SQL), and enterprise management.
